---
title: "conftest.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/conftest.py"
loc: 113
complexity: 21
logic_score: 0.72
style_score: 3.73
intel_score: 5.65
overall_score: 3.11
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating mock_genai_client, temp_project. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 33 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [contextlib](file://contextlib)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `mock_genai_client`
- `temp_project`
- `prevent_api_key_leak`
- `isolate_warden_state`
- `_cleanup`
- `reset_hud_singleton`
- `_get_hud_instances`
- `_full_reset`
